content: Canvas rendered without accounting for devicePixelRatio looks blurry on Retina/high-DPI screens. Fix: set canvas width/height attributes to CSS size * devicePixelRatio, scale the 2d context by DPR, and keep CSS width/height at the intended display size. Higher DPR increases CPU/memory draw cost—cap DPR (e.g., at 2) to bound performance impact on high-DPI mobile/laptop screens. Listen for DPR changes via matchMedia if window can move between displays.
